_doc: CANONICAL paralinguistic tag map — SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for BOTH the trainer (data preprocessing) AND the C engine (encode carve-out). Each user-facing [tag] maps to an EXISTING reserved Qwen special-token id that the TTS pipeline never uses (LLM vision/box/quad/tool/fim/think slots). The FT RE-TRAINS that embedding row to mean the paralinguistic event. NO embedding resize needed. The 'token' is the existing special-token string HF tokenizes atomically to 'id'; the trainer replaces [tag] -> token in the transcript before tokenizing; the engine maps [tag] -> id in encode_with_special. Keep [tag], id, token in lockstep on both sides.
